note: studio-mac card renders name, tailnet host (100.101.14.32), ONLINE state (green dot), latency (12 ms via a live Ping-now RPC), agent version (0.5.2), Last seen (1s ago) and Registered (3d ago). Online/latency are the live-bridge fields, supplied by the sandbox stand-in outpost-host in lieu of an unreachable Mac; heartbeat is computed at request time so the card stays genuinely fresh across the 15s poll.

attic-mini heartbeat is 12m old (past HEARTBEAT_FRESH_MS=30s); the client's isOnline() flips it to OFFLINE (red dot, controls disabled, Latency dash). Stale heartbeat is seeded via a fixed offset in the sandbox registry.

Pair-a-new-Mac flow mints a token and surfaces the one-line installer, highlighted: curl -fsSL http://100.64.0.1:3702/install.sh | GARRISON_HOST=... GARRISON_TOKEN=op-tok-REDACTED GARRISON_MACHINE=loft-mac bash. Token is carried in the installer; the installer is shown and NOT run.

Show-log expands the invocation-log table (WHEN / VERB / CALLER / MS / RESULT) on the studio-mac card with rows across callers orchestrator, dev-env, kanban-loop, including a red failed row (exec.run kanban-loop, 5001 ms, RPC timeout). Log read from the seeded outposts/log/studio-mac.jsonl via the sandbox stand-in host.
